title: Fel's Record Player
description: Get vanilla music from discs with this mod
body:
![wawas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3145f33abea4eb475d3c034e5a41fd2413e8d903.png)

**A simple mod that adds a record player on your world, which is able to create any of the vanilla version available discs into a blank disc using the record player, use JEI or any other crafter to get the record player and blank disc recipes.**

![effef](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2306db8806e4cf3593bb607ab41d9405fd35c124.png)
